admission_process: Open the online application form from the Dumka Engineering College admissions page.
Follow the entrance-examination and counselling process required by the appropriate authority.
Keep the documents requested by the college ready for verification.
For admission assistance, contact the college admission office through the official website.
eligibility: According to the college prospectus, admission is based on the entrance examination and subsequent counselling by the appropriate authority. Confirm the current programme-specific criteria with the admission cell.
documents_required: Refer to the current document list on the official ongoing-admission page.
Contact the admission cell if you need confirmation of documents for your category or programme.
admission_deadline: B.Tech admission for the 2026-27 batch is currently shown as ongoing on the official college website. The page does not state a single closing date, so confirm the deadline with the admission office.
